chunks.title: Settling Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Describes the casting of lots and the leaders who moved to the holy city.

chunks.title: Population Registers
chunks.reason: Provides detailed genealogies and headcounts for Judah, Benjamin, priests, Levites, and gatekeepers.

chunks.title: Distribution of People
chunks.reason: Summarizes the location of remaining Israelites and lists specific officials in Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Villages of Judah and Benjamin
chunks.reason: Lists the specific towns and villages where the tribes settled outside Jerusalem.
